title: Student Academic Credentials
description: The academic credentials the student has been awarded.

createdOn.title: Created On

modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student academic credential.

student.title: Student
student.description: The student who has been awarded an academic credential.

id.description: The global identifier for the Student.

credential.description: The academic credential that has been awarded.

id.description: The global identifier for the Credential.

earnedOn.title: Earned On

disciplines.title: Disciplines
disciplines.description: The disciplines associated with the awarded credentials.

items.description: The disciplines associated with the awarded credentials.

id.title: ID

recognitions.title: Recognitions

id.title: ID

graduatedOn.description: The date the student graduated from the program.
